claims.summary: The smoothstep onset near entropy 0.85 may suppress a perceptually important change.
claims.disposition: Verified exact boundary tests at 0.8501 and 0.8505, plus continuity and no-pop invariants, expose the deliberately tiny onset without changing it.

claims.summary: High-variance narrative-arc dimensions may flatten at FEATURE_ABS_MAX.
claims.disposition: Verified narrative headroom, curvature, direction, emotional flatline, and reserved-dimension tests distinguish bounded clipping risk from actual arc evidence.

claims.summary: Smoothstep should be compared locally with a steeper sigmoid around the gate.
claims.disposition: Routed to an offline transform comparison using copied vectors; outputs remain evidence only and cannot reach dispatch.

claims.summary: Density gradient should increase vibrancy slope after the entropy gate.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because changing slope or gradient coupling alters live codec transport/gain and requires explicit operator approval.
